tasks.label: BootCampCart API: docker compose logs api
BootCampCart API: reset and restart
tasks.command: export DOCKER_DEFAULT_PLATFORM=linux/amd64 && docker compose down -v --remove-orphans && docker compose up --build -d --force-recreate

tasks.label: BootCampCart API: recreate DB and verify coupon cart flow
tasks.command:
export DOCKER_DEFAULT_PLATFORM=linux/amd64 && docker compose down -v --remove-orphans && docker compose up --build -d --force-recreate && echo '--- APPLY ---' && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/v1/cartitems/1/apply-coupon -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"code":"SAVE10"}' && echo '
--- CART ITEM ---' && curl -s http://localhost:8000/v1/cartitems/1

tasks.label: BootCampCart API: create cart item and apply coupon
tasks.command:
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/v1/cartitems -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"Demo Item","price":20.0,"quantity":1}' && echo '
--- APPLY ---' && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/v1/cartitems/1/apply-coupon -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"code":"SAVE10"}' && echo '
--- CART ---' && curl -s http://localhost:8000/v1/cartitems/1

tasks.label: BootCampCart API: verify coupon on cart item
tasks.command:
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/v1/cartitems -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"Demo Item","price":20.0,"quantity":1}' > /tmp/cart-create.json && cart_id=$(python - <<'PY'
import json
with open('/tmp/cart-create.json') as f:
    print(json.load(f)['id'])
PY
) && echo "cart_id=$cart_id" && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/v1/cartitems/$cart_id/apply-coupon -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"code":"SAVE10"}' && echo '
---' && curl -s http://localhost:8000/v1/cartitems/$cart_id

tasks.label: BootCampCart API: verify coupon on cart item
tasks.command:
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/v1/cartitems -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"Demo Item","price":20.0,"quantity":1}' > /tmp/cart-create.json && cart_id=$(python3 - <<'PY'
import json
with open('/tmp/cart-create.json') as f:
    print(json.load(f)['id'])
PY
) && echo "cart_id=$cart_id" && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/v1/cartitems/$cart_id/apply-coupon -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"code":"SAVE10"}' && echo '
---' && curl -s http://localhost:8000/v1/cartitems/$cart_id

tasks.label: BootCampCart API: verify coupon on cart item
tasks.command:
cart_id=46 && echo "cart_id=$cart_id" && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/v1/cartitems/$cart_id/apply-coupon -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"code":"SAVE10"}' && echo '
---' && curl -s http://localhost:8000/v1/cartitems/$cart_id

tasks.label: BootCampCart API: verify coupon response
tasks.command:
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/v1/cartitems/46/apply-coupon -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"code":"SAVE10"}' && echo '
---' && curl -s http://localhost:8000/v1/cartitems/46
